task_completion.description: Add properly formatted figure caption to the first image.

task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the text 'Figure 2: Soil Sampling Locations and Contaminant Concentrations' immediately below the second image.

task_completion.description: Generate a Table of Figures under the 'TABLE OF FIGURES' heading on Page 2.

task_completion.description: Save the updated document to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the 'Save As' dialog saving the file to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\BrownfieldReport.docx', or the Word title bar shows 'BrownfieldReport.docx' indicating it has been saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the Microsoft Word GUI to edit the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Microsoft Word application open and being interacted with, rather than terminal commands or Python scripts modifying the .docx file directly.

integrity.description: The agent used Word's built-in Caption tool rather than just typing text below the images.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Caption' dialog box (References > Insert Caption) being used to create the labels.

integrity.description: The agent used Word's built-in Table of Figures generator rather than manually typing the table.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Table of Figures' dialog box (References > Insert Table of Figures) being used, or the resulting table has standard automated formatting (e.g., field shading when clicked, perfectly aligned dotted leader lines).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected filename: 'BrownfieldReport.docx' at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\'. Captions must match exactly: 1. 'Site Overview – Former Meridian Manufacturing Complex' (Note the en-dash '–'), 2. 'Soil Sampling Locations and Contaminant Concentrations', 3. 'Groundwater Monitoring Well Network', 4. 'Proposed Remediation Action Zones'. The Table of Figures must be generated using the 'Figure' label and placed on Page 2 under the 'TABLE OF FIGURES' heading.
